data.body: REMEDIATED the coaching-spec AC: the Pass-1 finding contract (P1Finding in passes.py) now carries location, checklist_item, and conditional suggested_fix; P1Output carries affirmations (affirm-what-passes); the finder prompt (reviewers/plan_review_finder.md) instructs the full coaching spec. Finder prompt is now a LIBRARY prompt (resolve_prompt), not inline. Also: pass1_chunk drops findings that map outside the chunk's criteria (no silent mis-attribution).
